subcodes.first_line: These are days, days of newfound joy, for in the City of Lovers a lover hath attained unto the desire of his heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایام ایام فرح جدید است چه که در مدینه عشاق عاشقی بکام دل رسید و بما هو
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat]
